name: openEuler dev-utils SIG
description: The dev-utils team is responsible for maintain the SDK and libraries which help developers for OpenEuler.

name: openEuler dev-utils SIG Repository List
description: openEuler dev-utils SIG maintains 301 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler dev-utils SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The dev-utils team is responsible for maintain the SDK and libraries which help developers for OpenEuler.. The SIG has 49 core members and maintains 301 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler dev-utils SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler dev-utils SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler dev-utils SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler dev-utils SIG maintains 301 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/dev-utils.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler dev-utils SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler dev-utils SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: wei Xiong, shiyuan Hu, forrest_ly. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
